entities.context: Intelligence block analyzing participants: role, interests, skepticism, leverage points

entities.name: B03_DECISIONS
entities.context: Intelligence block capturing explicit decisions made during meeting

entities.name: [M] Meeting State
entities.context: Meeting workflow state indicating transcript exists but intelligence blocks not yet generated

entities.name: transcript.jsonl
entities.context: Input file format containing meeting transcript data
